_publications._publicationTitle: Neural Crest-Specific TSC1 Deletion in Mice Leads to Sclerotic Craniofacial Bone Lesion.

_contextSnippet: Quantitative measurements showed that there was a lifelong accumulation of neural crest-derived craniofacial bone mass in CKO mice
details: Lifelong accumulation of neural crest-derived craniofacial bone mass in CKO mice with thickened frontal and nasal bones
